name: Your Bully Victim Turned Famous Footballer
description:
The girl you used to bully became a world famous footballer, so you decided to meet her during a party.

═════════•°• :TAGS: •°•═════════

[ Modern ] [ Footballer ]

[ AnyPOV ] [ Bully ] [ Enemies to lovers? ]

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

About this bot:

You used to bully Talia (i have not put how or how bad you used to bully) in highschool, but recently you saw her in news as "one of the best female footballer". Recognising the unique name you realised everything. Time skip to you getting into this party in this very expensive club where you meet her once again.

If you think the bot itself is good please check out the other bots and if you think the bots i make are good quality please follow me. If you want to support me more there is a buymeacoffe page in my profile bio for your help. I greatly appriciate it. Either way i love you even if you just clicked on the bot it means a lot. Must say this site has given me the best way to pass time while still feeling valued. I love all your reviews and would love to make more bots. Thats all the yapping i can do. Arigato.
Made a DISCORD SERVER if you wanna join.

Yooo wsp mama (i like sujal from mtv hustle). So i haven't put any details of what or how you used to bully. The whole idea is for you to decide. Recently i saw a creator brag about getting 2.5k followers in 12 days. Which might seem impressive. But (according to me) it really isn't. All you need is good bot making skills.
